title: begonia lilliputana
intro: Begonia lilliputana, also known as the Fairy Begonia, is a rare and delicate species of flowering plant that belongs to the Begonia genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Begonia lilliputana include treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
